name: Ethernet Component
description: This ESPHome component enables *wired* Ethernet connections for ESP32 and RP2040 boards.

config_entries.label: Type
config_entries.description: The type of LAN chipset/phy. Supported chipsets are.

config_entries.label: Clk
config_entries.description: datasheet for more details. Must be one of the following values.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Power Pin
config_entries.description: The pin controlling the power/reset status of the Ethernet controller. Leave unspecified for no power pin (default).

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Clock Speed
config_entries.description: The SPI clock speed. ESP32 only. Any frequency between `8MHz` and `80MHz` is allowed, but the nearest integer division of `80MHz` is used, i.e. `16MHz` (`80MHz` / 5) is used when `15MHz` is configured. Default: `26.67MHz`.

config_entries.label: Domain
config_entries.description: Set the domain of the node hostname used for uploading. For example, if it's set to `.local`, all uploads will be sent to `<HOSTNAME>.local`. Defaults to `.local`.

config_entries.label: Enable On Boot
config_entries.description: If enabled, the Ethernet interface will be enabled on boot. Defaults to `true`.

config_entries.label: Interface
config_entries.description: Controls which ESP-IDF SPI implementation should be used. Value may be either `spi2` or `spi3`.

config_entries.label: MAC Address
config_entries.description: Set the MAC address of the ethernet interface.

config_entries.label: Manual IP
config_entries.description: Manually configure the static IP of the node.

config_entries.label: Gateway
config_entries.description: The gateway of the local network.

config_entries.label: Static IP
config_entries.description: The static IP of your node.

config_entries.label: Subnet
config_entries.description: The subnet of the local network.

config_entries.label: DNS1
config_entries.description: The main DNS server to use.

config_entries.label: DNS2
config_entries.description: The backup DNS server to use.

config_entries.label: Phy Addr
config_entries.description: The PHY addr type of the Ethernet controller. Defaults to 0.

config_entries.label: Phy Registers
config_entries.description: Arbitrary PHY register values to set after Ethernet initialization.

config_entries.label: Page ID
config_entries.description: (RTL8201 only) Register page number to select before writing (e.g. `0x07` for page 7)

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The register address as a hex number (e.g. `0x10` for address 16)

config_entries.label: Value
config_entries.description: The value of the register to set as a hex number (e.g. `0x1FFA`  )

config_entries.label: Polling Interval
config_entries.description: If `interrupt_pin` is not set, set the time interval for periodic polling. Minimum is 1ms; defaults to 10ms. ESP32 only. Older frameworks may not support this variable. See below for details.

config_entries.label: Use Address
config_entries.description: Manually override what address to use to connect to the ESP. Defaults to auto-generated value. For example, if you have changed your static IP and want to flash OTA to the previously configured IP address.
